reason: The remediation only edits NTP/chrony configuration files to set or add a maxpoll value. This is a straightforward text substitution that does not disable services, alter authentication, or affect boot-critical components. The change is low risk and can be validated by checking NTP synchronization after applying.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Incorrect maxpoll value could affect time synchronization accuracy; Potential syntax error in config file if the script fails
